sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see what changed! Comparing to the initial state:
- Node 10 (cross): boundary was [[44, 48], [44, 49], [49, 49], [49, 48], [48, 48], [47, 47], [47, 46], [46, 46], [46, 47], [45, 48]] - now [[44, 52], [44, 53], [49, 53], [49, 52], [48, 52], [47, 51], [47, 50], [46, 50], [46, 51], [45, 52]]
So the cross moved from col 48 to col 52 (4 cells to the right)!
- Node 11 (yellow bar): boundary was [[44, 50], [44, 51], [49, 51], [49, 50]] - now [[44, 54], [44, 55], [49, 55], [49, 54]]
So the yellow bar also moved from col 50-51 to col 54-55 (4 cells to the right)!
- Node 2 (gray): boundary changed from [[1, 0], [1, 31], [27, 31], [27, 20], [28, 19], [31, 19], [32, 20], [32, 51], [43, 51], [43, 48], [44, 47], [45, 47], [45, 46], [46, 45], [47, 45], [48, 46], [48, 47], [49, 47], [50, 48], [50, 51], [63, 51], [63, 55], [63, 0]]
So the gray area expanded to the right!
- Node 3 (white upper right): boundary changed from [[1, 32], [1, 63], [23, 63], [23, 60], [24, 59], [27, 59], [27, 32]] - now [[1, 28], [1, 63], [23, 63], [23, 60], [24, 59], [27, 59], [27, 28]]
So the white area expanded to the left (from col 32 to col 28)!
- Node 8 (white lower right): boundary changed from [[32, 52], [32, 59], [35, 59], [36, 60], [36, 63], [63, 63], [63, 52]] - now [[32, 56], [32, 59], [35, 59], [36, 60], [36, 63], [63, 63], [63, 56]]
So the white area shrank from col 52 to col 56 (shrank by 4 cells on the left)!
So clicking on the black bar moved the cross and yellow bar to the right by 4 cells! The white corridor expanded to the left, and the gray area expanded to the right. The white lower right corridor shrank.
This is interesting! The cross and yellow bar moved right by 4 cells. The white corridor expanded left, gray expanded right, white lower right shrank.
This suggests the puzzle is about moving the cross/yellow bar to the blue squares on the right edge. The blue squares are at col 60-63. The cross is now at col 52-53, yellow bar at col 54-55. They need to move right by more.
Let me try clicking the black bar again to move them further right!

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I can see what changed! Comparing to the initial state:
- Node 10 (cross): boundary was [[44, 48], [44, 49], [49, 49], [49, 48], [48, 48], [47, 47], [47, 46], [46, 46], [46, 47], [45, 48]] - now [[44, 52], [44, 53], [49, 53], [49, 52], [48, 52], [47, 51], [47, 50], [46, 50], [46, 51], [45, 52]]
So the cross moved from col 48 to col 52 (4 cells to the right)!
- Node 11 (yellow bar): boundary was [[44, 50], [44, 51], [49, 51], [49, 50]] - now [[44, 54], [44, 55], [49, 55], [49, 54]]
So the yellow bar also moved from col 50-51 to col 54-55 (4 cells to the right)!
- Node 2 (gray): boundary changed from [[1, 0], [1, 31], [27, 31], [27, 20], [28, 19], [31, 19], [32, 20], [32, 51], [43, 51], [43, 48], [44, 47], [45, 47], [45, 46], [46, 45], [47, 45], [48, 46], [48, 47], [49, 47], [50, 48], [50, 51], [63, 51], [63, 55], [63, 0]]
So the gray area expanded to the right!
- Node 3 (white upper right): boundary changed from [[1, 32], [1, 63], [23, 63], [23, 60], [24, 59], [27, 59], [27, 32]] - now [[1, 28], [1, 63], [23, 63], [23, 60], [24, 59], [27, 59], [27, 28]]
So the white area expanded to the left (from col 32 to col 28)!
- Node 8 (white lower right): boundary changed from [[32, 52], [32, 59], [35, 59], [36, 60], [36, 63], [63, 63], [63, 52]] - now [[32, 56], [32, 59], [35, 59], [36, 60], [36, 63], [63, 63], [63, 56]]
So the white area shrank from col 52 to col 56 (shrank by 4 cells on the left)!
So clicking on the black bar moved the cross and yellow bar to the right by 4 cells! The white corridor expanded to the left, and the gray area expanded to the right. The white lower right corridor shrank.
This is interesting! The cross and yellow bar moved right by 4 cells. The white corridor expanded left, gray expanded right, white lower right shrank.
This suggests the puzzle is about moving the cross/yellow bar to the blue squares on the right edge. The blue squares are at col 60-63. The cross is now at col 52-53, yellow bar at col 54-55. They need to move right by more.
Let me try clicking the black bar again to move them further right!
